calendar.matters:
Hearing Re: Surplus Funds From Proceeds
Off Calendar Apr-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Kevin E. Fusch; French Lyon Tang, APC; 415-597-7800; appeaing via Zoom on behalf of Judgment Creditor East West Bank.
Douglas Kwan, power of attorney for claimant Sheldon Fong, appearing in person.

Hearing held. All parties present submit to the court's tentative ruling. The court rules as follows:

HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS: The deposited funds of $390,362.24 shall be distributed as follows: $234,768.70 shall be transferred to Claimant EWB to satisfy Sheldon Fong's judgment lien and the remaining balance of $155,593.45 transferred to Claimant Sheldon Fong. The parties shall contact Fiscal Services Division of the Superior Court to request the funds: AREVENUE@SFTC.ORG

Counsel for judgment creditor East West Bank to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Deposit And Distribute Surplus Funds; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-23-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

CLAIMANT EAST WEST BANK'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON MOTION AND MOTION TO DEPOSIT AND DISTRIBUTE SURPLUS FUNDS is GRANTED. Funds to be deposited forthwith.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
